# K1LADEX
> AI-powered investor intelligence framework. Seven checkpoints. One verdict.

## What this site does
K1LADEX scores any stock through 7 checkpoints and returns a single verdict. Built by a retail investor from real losses and real wins.

## Key concepts
- SIGNAL+ scoring framework
- Eyes of the World scan system
- AI² Augmented Investor Intelligence
- Estimated Prints track record

## Pages
- k1ladex.com — landing page and framework overview
- app.k1ladex.com — live scan engine
